temporal_description:
A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark, disheveled hair and a mustache. He has a worried and intense expression, looking off-camera to his right. The lighting is dim and has a greenish-blue tint, casting shadows on his face. In the background, vertical bars, like those of a jail cell, are visible but out of focus. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera remains steady, holding the tight focus on the man's concerned face. The audio opens with a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score, creating a tense and serious atmosphere. The sound of a faint, rhythmic clicking, like a computer keyboard or a timer, is layered over the music, adding to the feeling of anticipation and urgency.

The scene cuts to a man in a dark suit and tie, standing in what appears to be a dimly lit control room. He is shown in profile, looking down and to his left with a serious expression. He brings his hand up to his mouth, touching his chin thoughtfully. In the background, other people are visible, and several computer monitors with blue and green screens are on a console. The same white Chinese characters, "风行网," are present in the top left corner. The camera is positioned at a medium distance, capturing the man from the chest up. The shot is stable. A man then speaks in a calm, professional, and slightly concerned tone, as if reporting information in a serious setting. He says, "也是快艇" (yěshì kuàitǐng), which translates to "It's also a speedboat." His voice is steady and clear, conveying a sense of focused observation and reporting.
